title: echium vulgare subsp. coincyanum
intro: Echium vulgare subsp. coincyanum, also known as Coin Purple Viper's Bugloss, is a subspecies of the Echium vulgare plant, which is a flowering perennial plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coin Purple Viper's Bugloss include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
